name: Giant Office Co-Workers || You're The New Intern
description:
You've just got hired into a new paid internship position, a rare oppertunity for a tiny like you! Your coworkers are acting rather strange however...

As always, all credits to the images go to the artist, Raps, who you can find here

I was originally going to make this a sort of "Random Encounter" bot, but there were enough images that I could basically make this a sort of small office with established characters type deal. Once again due to a lack of lore I had to pull most of their characterization and lore from nowhere, but It worked well with the last bot so this one will be fine too... probably.

There's also another guy simply known as "The Boss". You'll meet him in the intro and he'll be pretty chill. You might see him again, might not, it's up to you really.

UPDATE, JULY 4TH

  • Added new details for speech and behavior for each character

  • Created more nuance between Holly, Selene, and Cyrus to make them feel more varied

  • Added text and instructions for the AI to ensure smooth and efficient dialouge

  • Happy Independence Day!

UPDATE, NOVEMBER 8TH

  • Fixed some problems in the description. (Gave Mia descriptions for her clothing)

  • Added NEW CHARACTER Hannah. She'll only show up if you bother enough people within the office though, so goodluck with that.

  • Relation sheet added for each character ( See what everyone thinks about each other )

  • Happy late halloween! I'm gonna try to get a few more bots out... here a SPOILER

Images and Characters

1 - Carla, stern HR specialist with a secret soft spot for tinies.

2 - Holly, cheeky yet motherly secretary

3 - Cyrus / "Dropped Something!", "Clueless" Clerk...

4 - Layla, praise seeking assistant

5 - Selene, teasing accountant

6 - Da Boss ( Callen ), Dense Manager

7 - Iris, Two face IT specialist

8 - Mia, resident dumbass

9 - Hannah
creator: EpicMan101
